scenario_description: Lower inflation, lower yields, weaker growth, weaker equities, mild gold support.
Correlated hawkish shock: higher yields, higher inflation, moderately higher VIX, wider spreads.
US inflation shock of +1 percentage point YoY.
Parallel +100 bps shock to US 2Y and US 10Y yields.
Higher inflation, wider spreads, higher volatility, weaker equities, supportive gold.
Severe risk-off crisis with spread widening, volatility spike, large drawdowns, gold support.
Dollar strength regime with weaker EUR/USD and GBP/USD, weaker risk assets, higher stress.
Volatility shock with VIX rising by 10 points.
